meaning: n.摔跤,翻跟头,翻筋斗adj.歪斜状的
examples: Brown leaves were tumbling, flying wildly in the frozen air and reburying her.
That lint you see is from your clothes slowly being disintegrated by all the tumbling.
This year, eight universities formed the National Competitive Stunts and Tumbling Association (NCSTA).
His remarks sent the Kiwi tumbling nearly a penny in Asian trade on Wednesday.
The carnage on Wall Street sent markets tumbling again at the open on Tuesday.
